paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close and a 36.32 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing the company's lack of revenue and significant loss, as well as expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year. The news item is dated July 18, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms, with a total of 25 filings in the feed and one Form 4 filing. The recent filings include announcements of convertible senior notes and the resignation of a director, as well as other disclosures.
